title: Breakwave Tanker Report 9.19.2023
summary:

in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 19/09/2023
Period rates and freight futures point to a solid recovery, but spot VLCC rates still struggle - Although sentiment
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2023-09-19_BreakwaveTankersSeptember192023Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2023-09-19_BreakwaveTankersSeptember192023Report.pdf

[Page 1]
BWET
Tanker Shipping
September 19, 2023
Breakwave Tanker Futures Index: 1,178 VLCC Middle East-Asia Spot Rates: $9.13 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -11.6% ↓ 30D: -20.1% Momentum: Negative
↓ YTD: -0.9% ↓ YTD: -48.4% Sentiment: Positive
↓ YOY: -29.2% ↓ YOY: -57.5% Fundamentals: Positive
Bi-Weekly Report
• Period rates and freight futures point to a solid recovery, but spot VLCC rates still struggle - Although sentiment
in the tanker market remains upbeat, spot rates have not been able to show some solid momentum to satisfy such
a bullish outlook. Recent transactions for period rates hit a new six-month high (1-year period deals) while freight
futures for the fourth quarter have also recently recovered and are back to late August levels. Yet, spot rates have
not followed, with the spot VLCC benchmark rate at just above $9
